label: Add Submodel Descriptor
description: Attach a submodel descriptor to an existing shell.

params.name: shell_id
params.description: ID of the shell to attach to

params.name: semantic_id
params.description: Semantic ID (URN of the aspect model)

params.name: endpoint_url
params.description: URL where the submodel data can be fetched

outputs.name: submodel_id
outputs.description: ID of the attached submodel descriptor
